use_cases: Display status labels like 'new', 'sale', or 'featured' on product cards
Show feature availability indicators in pricing or comparison tables
Mark notification states or read/unread status indicators
Display category tags or filtering labels in content management
Indicate feature flags or plan tiers in SaaS dashboards
ai_summary: A lightweight, reusable badge component with four style variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline) for displaying labels, status indicators, and categorical tags. Built with class-variance-authority for consistent styling and TypeScript support, commonly used in pricing cards and data display contexts to highlight metadata.
